title: Polymarket BTC 5 Minutes Bot - 70%+ Win Rate
author: Stimulant-RS
selftext:
Hello! I built this signal bot and I'm looking to build a profitable community for everyone, this has been tested I was able to make some profit and my goal is basically to become the best trading bot for Polymarket and easy to use.  
  
Links:  
\- Website: [https://polypredictor.org](https://polypredictor.org)  
\- Discord: [https://discord.gg/t9RhcDDcRW](https://discord.gg/t9RhcDDcRW)  
  
How it works:

\- 6 signal gates analyze BTC direction every slot (Polymarket conviction, spread, flip, detection, time left, overextension, volume)  
\- Signal locks in and only fires when all gates agree.  
\- Skips the slot entirely when technicals and market odds disagree.  
\- Built-in demo mode so you can test it with fake money before risking anything real.  


There is a free trial of 30 minutes that resets every 24h so that you can try it and see if it works for you and I will be giving away 3 lifetime codes at 150 members, so be sure to join the discord! 🎁

\- Please note that predictions are not guaranteed to be 100% accurate. Errors can happen and market conditions can be volatile and unpredictable.

https://preview.redd.it/hntnyqhgn1rg1.png?width=931&format=png&auto=webp&s=281f5ab4a4b0f28ac3f689a8221da89d6e56e647

replies.author: No-Consequence-1779
replies.body: It’s the future!  The sandwich making robots are coming ; ready or not.

comments.author: Delicious_Pipe_1326
comments.body:
Buying DOWN at 95 cents means you risk $0.95 to win $0.05. Your "79% win rate" loses money at that entry price. You need 95%+ just to break even.

But hey, free 30-minute trial.

replies.author: Stimulant-RS
replies.body: This was just an exemple picture of the dashbord, it doesnt fire at this price.

replies.author: No-Consequence-1779
replies.body: Yes. I’m curious about fees. They easily eat profit. .

comments.author: Greedy-Vast99
comments.body: The 6-gate system is interesting, but in fast markets like btc a lot of agreement signals end up being correlated inputs rather than independent confirmation. i won 5 temperature markets in a row using AI weather agent Kumo. the key is to get the forecasted highest temp from AI weather agent Kumo a day in advance (like 5-6pm on the day before), place a position, and sell it the next day
